Headline: #63 63rd, #6 Jackson Park Express, #28 Stony Island, #15 Jeffrey Local and #192 U. of Chicago/Hospitals Express Temporary Reroute near 63rd/Stony Island
ShortDescription: 63 63rd, 6 Jackson Park Express, 28 Stony Island, 15 Jeffrey Local and 192 U. of Chicago/Hospitals Express buses are temp. rerouted, near 63rd/Stony Island.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#63 63rd, #6 Jackson Park Express, #28 Stony Island, #15 Jeffrey Local and #192 U. of Chicago/Hospitals Express buses are temporarily rerouted, due to police activity near 63rd/Stony Island.

#63 63rd buses are rerouted in both directions:

Eastbound buses will continue at 63rd Stony Island and enter beach.

Westbound buses will exit beach and continue over normal route.

#6 Jackson Park Express, #28 Stony Island, #15 Jeffrey Local buses:

Southbound buses are temporarily rerouted via Stony Island, 63rd, Hayes, Cornell, 65th, Stony Island and over normal route.

Northbound buses are temporarily rerouted via Stony Island, 64th, Blackstone, 63rd, Stony Island and over 
normal route.

#192 U. of Chicago/Hospitals Express:
Northbound #192 U. of Chicago/Hospitals Express buses are temporarily rerouted via 63rd, Stony Island and over normal route

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
